name: Rain Alley
description: Rain hisses on chrome ducts while ad-light breaks itself apart in the puddles below your boots.
detail: A clinic bill has been pinned to a payphone with a knife. Steam crawls around the noodle cart and the service ladder up to the relay roofs.

fixtures.name: payphone
fixtures.inspect: The payphone's receiver is slick with rain and someone else's grease. A clinic bill is pinned to it with a knife labelled in courier blue.

fixtures.name: service ladder
fixtures.inspect: The ladder to the relay roofs buzzes when the weather turns mean. Tonight it sounds impatient.

mood: The rain has the steady, professional rhythm of someone who is not stopping for you.
Two of the alley's ad-lights are out; the surviving one keeps cycling a clinic discount nobody believes.
Tonight the puddles smell of clinic detergent and somebody is pretending not to notice.

scavenge.note: You work the puddles, bill edges, and payphone housing for anything the rain missed.
scavenge.message: You pull a damp hush patch and a few loose credits out of the alley's excuses.
